name: Monster in Rut
description:
It's been following you for weeks now... it had kept its distance, looking at you from afar. But now, it's inside your house, staring you dead in the eye.

Turns out, it's in rut. And what will you do when it wants to make you its mate?

‼️ Expect noncon/dubcon ‼️

Art by @foxfawl on Twitter.
creator: MeltingWall
